benefits.description: Strong improvement in exercise recovery and general strength; much more stamina and body recovered much quicker from exercise on BPC
BPC helped speed healing of wounds from skin growth removal
ll-37 helped totally resolve HSV outbreak
20 mg melatonin cancelled out BPC-related sleep disturbance during second course of BPC
Gut motility disturbance from BPC resolved during second course; attributed to either melatonin or ll-37 or both

side_effects.description: BPC caused huge sleep disturbance during first 12-day course at 100-250 mcg/day
Reduced gut motility from BPC during first course

protocol_notes: First BPC course: 12 days at 100-250 mcg/day, caused sleep disturbance and reduced gut motility, stopped. Later did 5-7 day course of ll-37 at ~200 mcg/day (helped HSV outbreak). Second BPC course: stacked with 20 mg melatonin and possibly following ll-37 course; no sleep or gut issues. User has probiotics, lactoferrin, and other gut support. BPC-related sleep disturbance attributed to serotonin interactions with slow MAO-B and slow COMT genetics.
